_comment:
Portal connections for Guild Wars maps.
Each link pairs two zone-transition portals.
Managed by WorldMap+ widget – portal IDs are stable (map_id * 1000 + portal_index when no JSON exists, or sequential IDs from portal_destinations.json).
Usable by bots and routing tools: portal_a/b contain map_id, map_name, game_x/y, and destination info.
